# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-app-deployment
  labels:
    app: web-app
    tier: frontend
    environment: production
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-app
      tier: frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-app
        tier: frontend
        environment: production
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web-app
        image: your-registry/your-web-app:production-v1.0 # Replace with your web app image
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: "200m"
            memory: "256Mi"
          limits:
            cpu: "500m"
            memory: "512Mi"
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached-deployment
  labels:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
    environment: production
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
      tier: cache
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
        tier: cache
        environment: production
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: memcached
        image: memcached:1.6.22-alpine # Using a stable, lightweight Memcached image
        ports:
        - containerPort: 11211
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: "50m"
            memory: "64Mi"
          limits:
            cpu: "200m"
            memory: "256Mi"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-service
  labels:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
    environment: production
spec:
  selector:
    app: memcached
  ports:
  - protocol: TCP
    port: 11211
    targetPort: 11211
  type: ClusterIP # Exposes the service only within the cluster
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: worker-deployment
  labels:
    app: background-worker
    tier: backend
    environment: production
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: background-worker
      tier: backend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: background-worker
        tier: backend
        environment: production
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: background-worker
        image: your-registry/your-worker-app:production-v1.0 # Replace with your worker app image
        # No ports needed if workers don't expose an API
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: "100m"
            memory: "128Mi"
          limits:
            cpu: "300m"
            memory: "512Mi"
